headline: Evergy's Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: EVRG tops Q1 estimates as operating EPS rises to 69 cents and revenues climb to $1.44 billion, while interest expense increases 14.4% Y/Y.
